ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., sensor, actuator) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the device */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., ONLINE, OFFLINE, MAINTENANCE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_data" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the device generating the data */,
  "transversal" REAL /* Transversal measurement reported by the device */,
  "longitudinal" REAL /* Longitudinal measurement reported by the device */,
  "vertical" REAL /* Vertical measurement reported by the device */,
  "hit_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the device (e.g., SAFE, WARNING, DANGER) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., sensor, actuator) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the device */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., ONLINE, OFFLINE, MAINTENANCE) */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Current battery level of the device (if applicable) */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Version of the firmware running on the device */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Error code indicating any issues with the device or data transmission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the threshold */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., sensor, actuator) */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric for which the threshold is defined (e.g., transversal, longitudinal) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert triggered when the threshold is exceeded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the alert */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the device generating the alert */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., WARNING, DANGER) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., ADMIN, VIEWER) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)
